summary: Vertical video. A clip from Fox News 'The Story with Martha MacCallum' featuring a live interview with U.N. Ambassador Mike Waltz about US-Iran nuclear talks. Frames show a news studio set, lower-third chyrons ('FOX NEWS ALERT', 'NOW: U.N. AMB WALTZ ON U.S.-IRAN TALKS'), a 'LIVE' bug, and a map graphic of Iran's nuclear facilities. It is a televised news interview.
notable_text: On-screen chyrons: 'FOX NEWS ALERT', 'NOW: U.N. AMB WALTZ ON U.S.-IRAN TALKS', 'MIKE WALTZ | U.S. AMBASSADOR TO THE U.N.', 'IRAN'S NUCLEAR FACILITIES', 'LIVE'.
